name: Command
description: You speak a one-word command to a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or follow the command on its next turn. Common commands include Approach, Drop, Flee, Grovel, and Halt.
effect: Target must follow a single-word command on its next turn (Wisdom save resists); e.g. Flee, Grovel, Drop, Halt
notes: 1-round duration only — expires at end of target's next turn
Specific command action modeled via effect prose; command variety tracked in spell-mechanics-proposals.md
